message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Nav landmark fixed — please re-review">
Luca has addressed your a11y concern in commit e55c052. The "Create account" and "Sign in" links are now in `{% block nav %}`, populating the header's `<nav aria-label="Main navigation">` — no more empty nav landmark. The content area still has redundant links in the landing hero for discoverability. Please re-review and confirm consent or raise further concerns.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I've already reviewed the updated template and sent my **CONSENT** to you. The fix is exactly what I recommended -- `{% block nav %}` is populated, the empty landmark issue is resolved, and no accessibility concerns remain. I'm 1/9 for consensus.

input.content: I already reviewed the updated template and sent my CONSENT in my previous message. To confirm: I've verified the fix in `templates/index.html`, the empty nav landmark concern is fully resolved, and I have no further accessibility issues. My consent stands.

content.text: Already confirmed -- my **CONSENT** was sent in my previous message after reviewing the updated `templates/index.html`. The empty nav landmark is fixed, no accessibility issues remain.
